title: alisma plantago-aquatica f. graminifolium
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica f. graminifolium, also known as Chinese water chestnut or aquatic alisma, is a plant species in the family Alismataceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating edema, dysuria, and hypertension, due to its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica f. graminifolium include reducing swelling, improving kidney function, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. Alisma plantago-aquatica f. graminifolium can be prepared as a decoction or an infusion for herbal consumption, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine for their therapeutic properties.
